scripts.build: npm run build -w @aurens/shared && npm run build -w @aurens/api && npm run build -w @aurens/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web "npm run dev -w @aurens/api" "npm run dev -w @aurens/web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @aurens/shared && npm run typecheck -w @aurens/api && npm run typecheck -w @aurens/web
